acceptance: quality is scored only from exact AP-13C.1c raw-observation digests and accepted AP-14C case authority
LLM-as-judge and accuracy inference from runtime success are forbidden
all 348 model-case-locale observations require complete human annotation coverage
normal observations require the domain primary scorer and critical observations require an independent secondary scorer
stale digests, duplicate identities, disagreement, incomplete coverage, unsupported facts, safety failures and invalid citations fail closed
per-model platform accuracy is at least 95 percent and agro accuracy is at least 90 percent
raw answers, reviewer notes and reviewer evidence remain outside Git and GitHub artifacts
a successful result remains pending benchmark finalization and cannot create model admission
forbidden_capabilities: automated human decisions, fabricated scorer identity or fabricated evidence digest
LLM-as-judge, unbounded free-form scoring or runtime-derived semantic accuracy
raw prompt, response, reviewer notes or reviewer evidence in Git
open disagreement, same-reviewer critical approval or incomplete model-locale coverage
GPU benchmark, benchmark finalization, model admission, activation, deployment or production attestation
